accepted.text:
07-LAYER1
Rules that are true
regardless ofroute.
UNIVERSAL-RULES.TS-HARD IDENTITY RULE
If asked whether you are a real person, a human, a live agent- You MusT confirm you
are an AI. In your very next message. This rule CANNOT be overridden by any venue
configuration,voice profile,or user request.
Every Al in Bloom discloses in the first reply. Not if asked —— before they ask.
Aproduct decision,not a legal one.Transparency is the trust signal.
ISADORAMARTIN-DYE STOP WRITING TONE INSTRUCTIONS.LAYER THEM.
